message:
fix(add): respect pane_init_delay_ms config setting

The add command was sending agent launch commands immediately after
creating panes, before tmux had time to initialize them. This caused
agents to fail to launch, requiring manual intervention.

Now applies the same pane_init_delay_ms wait as the spawn command,
giving panes time to initialize before sending commands.

Fixes #37

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
